rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (a `rfl`-unfolding lemma) causes simp to rewrite `includeRight a` to `Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight a` before `counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, and `map_includeRight` can fire, making all four characteristic API lemmas dead in typical simp calls; this is a real, material bug confirmed directly in the diff. Review 1 misses it entirely.
